meanings.definition: reason by deduction; establish by deduction

examples: The present name derives from an older form

meanings.definition: develop or evolve from a latent or potential state
come from; be connected by a relationship of blood, for example
examples: She was descended from an old Italian noble family

meanings.definition: formed or developed from something else; not original; - John Dewey
examples: the belief that classes and organizations are secondary and derived
